LanguageData.SettingStandByOnlyWhenCustomers: Stand by only when visitors present
LanguageData.SettingStandByOnlyWhenCustomersTooltip: When enabled, colonists assigned to stand by at a cash register will skip that job unless there is at least one friendly visitor or guest currently on the map. Saves labour when the map is empty of customers.
LanguageData.TabRegisterOpenedTooltip: When checked, customers can visit while a shift is active.
LanguageData.AlertNoRegisterExplanation: To open your store, you need at least one register. This can be built from the production tab.
LanguageData.AlertNoCashierExplanation: To operate your store, you need to set up at least one shift at a register and assign a capable cashier.
